All the candidates who are Enrolled and Appeared for class 10th of the year 2025 can download and Check Result / Subject Wise Marks. This year Jharkhand Board JAC Class 10th Exam will be held from 11 February 2025 to 03 March 2025 and JAC Xth Exam Result Declared on 27 May 2025.

Maharashtra Board Class 12th HSC Results 2023
GOVERNMENTMaharashtra State Board of Secondary & Higher Secondary Education, Pune declared this year 2022 12th HSC Exam result will be released on 25 May 2023 at 2 PM. Any student who is registered in Mahasrashtra Board Higher Secondary Exam 2023 can see their result. Maharashtra HSC Results be available online which can be checked by registered students by entering their roll number. </td>
—Check NotificationActive

Bihar Board Class 10th Matric Exam Result, Scrutiny and Compartment Result 2026
BIHAR BOARDBihar School Examination Board (BSEB) Bihar Board release the results for the Class 10th Matriculation Annual Board Exam 2026. The answer key has already been released for enrolled candidates. Candidates can check it and verify their answers. Candidates with objections to any answers can submit them within the deadline and time specified by the board. After the objection process is complete, the BSEB will declare the final result. Candidates will be able to check their results/marks by entering their roll code and roll number on the official website. The official result 29 March 2026.
—Check NotificationActive
